risks: No managed identity configured; Function App authenticates to Storage and Cosmos DB via connection strings and storage keys instead of RBAC-based access
No Application Insights resource included; monitoring, exception tracking, and diagnostics are absent from the plan
Consumption plan Y1 is used instead of the recommended Flex Consumption (FC1) plan; may cause cold starts and imposes a 5-10 minute execution time limit for PDF processing
Cosmos DB connection string is embedded inline in Function App app settings rather than stored in and referenced from Key Vault
Storage account does not disable local auth (allowSharedKeyAccess) or public blob access (allowBlobPublicAccess) per security best practices
Single-region Cosmos DB deployment with zone redundancy disabled; limited fault tolerance for metadata persistence
correctionsRecommended: Add a user-assigned managed identity resource and attach it to the Function App; use RBAC role assignments for Storage and Cosmos DB access instead of connection strings
Add an Application Insights resource (Microsoft.Insights/components) and wire it to the Function App via APPINSIGHTS_INSTRUMENTATIONKEY and APPLICATIONINSIGHTS_CONNECTION_STRING app settings
Switch from Consumption Y1 to Flex Consumption FC1 plan for improved cold-start performance, deployment support, and functionAppConfig with deployment.storage configuration
Move the Cosmos DB connection string into Key Vault and use a Key Vault reference (@Microsoft.KeyVault(...)) in the Function App app settings
Set allowBlobPublicAccess to false and allowSharedKeyAccess to false on the Storage Account resource properties

Add RBAC role assignments for the managed identity: Storage Blob Data Owner, Storage Blob Data Contributor, Storage Queue Data Contributor, Storage Table Data Contributor, and Monitoring Metrics Publisher
Add diagnostic settings resources (Microsoft.Insights/diagnosticSettings) for the Function App and other key resources
Add kv-pdfconverter-dev-001 to the Function App dependencies array to reflect the intended Key Vault integration from the user goal
